assignments.name: instruction
assignments.value: ={{ `The user rejected the previous Sarah Nutri video draft with this feedback: "${$json.feedback}". Rewrite the post so it addresses that feedback while staying concise, practical, warm, senior-friendly, and aligned with a video-first workflow. Return only the final post copy, with no labels, no commentary, and no media prompt. End the post with the original profile reference ${$json.sourceHandle || ""}. Previous draft: ${($json.postText || "").substring(0, 700)}. Source video page: ${$json.sourceTitle} - ${$json.sourceSnippet}` }}

parameters.text: ={{ `You are an expert social media manager for Sarah Nutri. ${$json.instruction} Return only the final post copy, with no labels, no commentary, no markdown headings, and no media prompt.` }}

={{ `Create a detailed photorealistic social video prompt for adults and seniors based on this post. Describe the subject, scene, pacing, camera motion, lighting, mood, framing, and realism. Keep the result ready for a Veo-style video generator. Post text: ${$json.text}` }}
